commit_message:
Resolve github issues Resolve github issues Related to https://github.com/IObundle/py2hwsw/pull/419

- Rename uart top to uart serial transceiver;
- Update block diagram, block names, and block descriptions.
- Upgrade py2hwsw version with new fixes from https://github.com/IObundle/py2hwsw/pull/419

Should resolve https://github.com/IObundle/iob-uart16550/issues/42

Resolve github issues Resolve github issues Related to https://github.com/IObundle/py2hwsw/pull/419

- Rename uart top to uart serial transceiver;
- Update block diagram, block names, and block descriptions.
- Upgrade py2hwsw version with new fixes from https://github.com/IObundle/py2hwsw/pull/419

Should resolve https://github.com/IObundle/iob-uart16550/issues/42
